'''Tensiger''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Tensiger commanded the [[6th regiment]] during the [[Raid on Picutorion]]. During the battle, elements of Tensiger's [[armor battalion]] penetrated a [[tracking station]] occupied by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="Picutorion" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Picutorion Viewed From the Top|book=Imperial Sourcebook|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
